title: Exporters Ke Liye Relief: RoDTEP Rates Aur Value Caps Restore!
content:
# Exporters Ke Liye Relief: RoDTEP Rates Aur Value Caps Restore!

Ek important update hai. Government ne exporters ko support karne ke liye RoDTEP (Remission of Duties and Taxes on Exported Products) rates aur value caps ko restore karne ka announcement kiya hai. Yeh kadam West Asia mein ho rahe trade disruptions ke chalte uthaya gaya hai.

*   **Kya Hua Hai:** Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT) ne RoDTEP scheme ke तहत rates aur value caps ko reinstate kar diya hai.
*   **Kyun Hua Hai:** Yeh decision West Asia mein badalte geopolitical situation, maritime logistics mein challenges, aur exporters ko ho rahe high freight costs aur war-related trade risks ko dekhte hue liya gaya hai.
*   **Notification Details:** Yeh update DGFT Notification No. 66/2025-26-DGFT, dated March 23, 2026, ke through aaya hai.
*   **Purane Order ka Status:** Is notification ne earlier Notification No. 60/2025-26 dated February 23, 2026, aur uska Corrigendum dated February 24, 2026, ko supersede kar diya hai, jiske through RoDTEP benefits ko 50% tak restrict kar diya gaya tha.
*   **Restored Rates:** Ab, RoDTEP rates aur value caps wapas February 22, 2026, wale levels par aa gaye hain.
*   **Effective Period:** Yeh restoration March 23, 2026, se March 31, 2026, tak ke exports ke liye applicable hoga, jaisa ki is notification ke corrigendum ne clarify kiya hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://content.dgft.gov.in/Website/dgftprod/1ffbd2bf-78ce-4d6e-8a59-5c0d16fdb1d0/Notification%2066%20English_0001.pdf)

*Published on: 24 March 2026*
